data.title: China Reaffirms Nationwide Crypto Ban as Regulators Target Stablecoin Risks
data.description:
China’s central bank has once again reinforced its uncompromising stance on digital assets. During a meeting on November 28, 2025, the People’s Bank of China (PBOC) reiterated that virtual assets, including cryptocurrencies and stablecoins, remain fully prohibited across the mainland.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/china-reaffirms-nationwide-crypto-ban-as-regulators-target-stablecoin-risks/

According to the report, more than 60 people have spoken out after a report […]

data.title: Arthur Hayes Warns Monad Could Crash 99% as “VC Coin” Risk Mounts
data.description:
Arthur Hayes says Monad’s high FDV and low float make it a risky “VC coin” that could fall 99%, warning most new layer-1 networks will fail while only a few survive.
source: https://btcusa.com/arthur-hayes-warns-monad-could-crash-99-as-vc-coin-risk-mounts/

data.title: US and EU Traders Push Bitcoin Higher as Selling Pressure Finally Cools
data.description:
Bitcoin is posting a steady recovery this week, with US and European trading hours taking clear leadership in driving returns. This shift marks a notable turnaround from recent weeks, when the same regions were responsible for sharp sell-offs and persistent downward price pressure.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/us-and-eu-traders-push-bitcoin-higher-as-selling-pressure-finally-cools/

data.description:

data.title: Planet Evening News
data.description: 1. The Hyperliquid team unstaking 2.6 million HYPE tokens in their wallet and conducted small-scale sell-offs and transfer tests; 2. The People's Bank of China held a meeting to combat cryptocurrency speculation and emphasized the risks of stablecoins; 3. BSC Meme's "Vulgar Penguin" token surpassed $10 million in market capitalization, rising over 180% in a single day; 4. KlarnaUSD, the first stablecoin under Swedish payment giant Klarna, was launched ahead of schedule; 5. The co-founder of Alliance DAO stated that L1 tokens lack a moat, and while they wouldn't short them, they weren't considered high-quality investments; 6. Stablecoin protocol STBL announced the launch of its rewards claiming feature; 7. CZ stated that it's better to sell when extremely greedy and buy when extremely fearful; 8. Binance Alpha: Users with at least 256 points can claim a 400 GAIX airdrop; 9. The Hyperliquid team address began intensively transferring tokens in batches, with the largest single transaction involving approximately 75,000 HYPE tokens.

data.title: Ukraine's Security Council Secretary Heads to U.S. for Peace Talks
data.description: According to Foresight News, Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky announced on social media that Rustem Umerov, Secretary of Ukraine's National Security and Defense Council and head of the Ukrainian delegation, has departed for the United States. Zelensky stated that Umerov submitted a report outlining clear objectives to swiftly and substantively develop steps needed to end the ongoing conflict. Ukraine aims to continue its constructive collaboration with the United States and anticipates that the outcomes of the Geneva conference will be implemented in the U.S.

data.title: Brother Machi added to his Ethereum long position, bringing his total to 8400 ETH, and also placed multiple sell orders for HYPE and ETH.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Huang Licheng, known as "Brother Machi," increased his 25x leveraged Ethereum long position to 8,400 ETH one hour ago, with a liquidation price of approximately $2,882. Simultaneously, he reduced his 10x leveraged HYPE long position to 215,000 HYPE, with a liquidation price of approximately $30. Furthermore, "Brother Machi" placed a limit sell order at $3,030, and has so far placed a total of 11 sell orders in the $3,010-$3,100 range, as well as 4 HYPE sell orders in the $36-$37 range.

data.title: Beijing Business Daily: Cryptocurrency trading is infiltrating platforms like Xiaohongshu, Taobao, and Xianyu, becoming a "hunting trap" for ordinary people.
data.description: The chaotic practice of redirecting users to cryptocurrency trading platforms is infiltrating mainstream platforms such as Xiaohongshu, Taobao, and Xianyu. Much content that appears to be "life sharing," "newcomer benefits," or "product links" is essentially an entry point to cryptocurrency trading groups, projects, or transactions, brewing a carefully orchestrated "hunt" for ordinary users. The report points out that common methods of redirection include: building a "persona" through trending topics, setting up referral advertising links on the platform, and disguising it as knowledge sharing. Industry insiders say that a "counter-hunt" against the chaos of cryptocurrency trading is underway, but a complete solution requires the joint efforts of regulators, platforms, and users. Previously, Pan Gongsheng, Governor of the People's Bank of China, clearly stated that the central bank will continue to severely crack down on the operation and speculation of virtual currencies within China, and the relevant regulatory policies since 2017 remain in effect. The central bank will also maintain a high-pressure stance in conjunction with law enforcement agencies, while continuously monitoring the development of overseas stablecoins. (Beijing Business Daily)

data.title: Google set to commit $2 million to boost AI skills, digital safety in Nigeria
data.description:
Google has announced plans to commit 3 billion naira (approximately $2 million) to improve Nigeria’s digital transformation. The funds will be disbursed through its philanthropic arm, Google. org, through several initiatives. The fund will be used to support programmes focused on building AI talent and strengthening digital safety and security within the community. The initiative is […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/google-to-boost-ai-digital-safety-nigeria/

data.title: AI predicts Ethereum price for December 1, 2025
data.description:
An artificial intelligence model predicts that Ethereum (ETH) is likely to hold above the $3,000 support level by December 1.
source: https://finbold.com/ai-predicts-ethereum-price-for-december-1-2025/

data.title: Stablecoin protocol STBL announces the launch of its rewards claim feature.
data.description: Stablecoin protocol STBL announced on the X platform that its rewards claiming feature is now live. Eligible contributors can visit the official page, log in with their X account, and link their wallets to claim their rewards. STBL added that the use of multi-factor staking in STBL dApps and the amount of USST minted will be incorporated into the rewards evaluation and will affect the leaderboard score, ensuring that deeper participation and genuine ecosystem contributions are reflected in the rewards leaderboard score.
